    Dr. Sharon Hunter

    Personal Information
    Fl 2
    Connecticut
    		 860 310-5559 (Phone)
    Additional Information
    Education/Experience
    Bastyr University, Doctorate of Naturopathic Medicine
    Cornell University, B.A. Psychology
    Social/Volunteer Organizations
    Former Editor Clinical Support Network of Naturopathic Physicians
    More Information
    Dr. Sharon Hunter has been providing thoughtful, science-based natural healthcare in West Hartford, CT for over 18 years. Trained expert in integrative and functional medicine, she utilizes natural therapies to help you: Understand why you are sick; Learn how to become healthy with the assistance of an individualized treatment plan; Leverage the best of natural healthcare and conventional medicine; Move beyond lack of disease and strive for optimal health.
    Featured Jobs More
    Contact

    300 New Jersey Ave NW, Suite 300
    Washington, DC 20001

    P: 202-237-8150
